rulings.Case Title: ANEESH GUPTA VS. BESS DAUBENMIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTS EDDY CHOY and MARIA CHOY's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED in the amount of $19,200. Defendants are the "prevailing party" within the meaning of SFRO 37.9(f), 37.2(h); see also paragraphs 14 and 21 of the First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Lifting Stay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS PETER LOUIE and VIVIENNE LOUIE's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Lifting Stay GRANTED. September 30, 2016 order and October 27, 2016 conditional judgment (subject to September 30, 2016 order) remain in effect. On September 30, 2016 this Court found that Defendants were in breach of certain obligations under their settlement agreement. The Court gave defendants an opportunity to rectify the breaches subject to requirements listed in detail in the order. The last payment under the order was due on October 30, 2016. On October 27, 2016 the Court executed a judgment specifically subjecting it to September 30, 2016 order. The judgment was not final and was to become effective only upon lifting of the stay for Defendant's failure to comply with September 30, 2016 order. On January 6, 2017 Plaintiff's appeared at an unopposed ex-parte seeking to lift a stay due to the expiration of time to file an appeal, not due to Defendant's failure to comply with September 30, 2016 order. Since there is no final judgment in this action, CCP 1008 may properly be considered. Defendants have shown new circumstances. January 6, 2017 order is vacated. The Court reconsiders January 6, 2017 application and denies it. Nothing in the application indicates that Defendants are in violation of September 30, 2016, and therefore October 27, 2016 judgement is not effective. The stay on entry of judgment remains effect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT CRAIG LIPTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to June 2, 2017 for Bankruptcy appeal status. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA FINANCIAL MORTGAGE CORPORATION VS. JEANNE KWONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer And Demurrer To Complaint For Foreclosure, Specific Performance, Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT JEANNE KWONG's Demurrer To Complaint For Foreclosure, Specific Performance, Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The statute of limitations arguments do not apply because the encumbered property was transferred before decedent's death, and thus, was not part of the estate and/or not available to the claimants of the estate. Additionally, the Probate Court held on June 13, 2016 that "Petition for Order Determining Ownership and Invalidity of the Disputed Deed of Trust" was not an appropriate probate matter. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WALTER RENNER VS. CALVIN CAHEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT CALVIN CAHEE's Motion For Dismissal OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service indicates that motion was mailed to an address that is not Plaintiff's counsel's address of record. The Court also notes that Plaintiff's counsel is deceased per State Bar information. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLD COURT LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. EDUARDO (ED) DEL PRADO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 2, 2017, line 6. DEFENDANT EDUARDO (ED) DEL PRADO's Motion For Dismissal DENIED. Dismissal with prejudice of Complaint filed on January 26, 2017, 10 days before this motion was filed. = (501/REQ)
